steps.title: Choose two points on the line
steps.content: Two clear approximate points on the line of best fit are $(0,2.5)$ and $(10,4.7)$. Use points on the line of best fit, not individual scatterplot points.

steps.title: Calculate the slope
steps.content:
Use rise over run:
$$m=\frac{4.7-2.5}{10-0}=\frac{2.2}{10}=0.22$$
The positive value matches the line rising from left to right. The answer is C.
